messages.content: please write a p5.js code program for codepen.io, it should have a button that randomly selects a position from a grid with 7 columns and 8 rows.
I entered the code and it shows nothing on the screen. Please make it better for the user to see
Why isn't it appearing on the screen?
Okay, it's working, but I need it to select a random box for the grid, not a hold column.
That's still only randomly select the column. Try making it select 1 cell. Only that cell should have the color.
Its still selecting a random  column with the color, not the cell with the color. Please do not let the whole column have the color, but only the cell
I still selecting a whole column and not an individual cell. Please only colorize the individual cell, not the whole column. Maybe try a different approach.
It's still only colorizing the column. Please evaluate why it is colorizing the column and not the individual cell, then fix it
It seems like your getting closer, but it's still only selecting the whole column and not an individual cell. Try putting an X on the selected cell
Great. Now please leave the previous X in it's position, do not remove that previous X,  and do not call that position again.
Great. Now please replace the X with an emoji, and place a cute robot emoji next to the random button
I get this error: Uncaught ReferenceError: selectRandomPosition is not defined
It's not actually placing the emoji in the cell. It works with the X, but not the emoji
Nevermind the emoji. Lets go back to when the X worked. I need you to label the rows and columns with numbers
